items.requirement: Confirm Aletheos does not alter or claim all B32K usage.

items.evidence_target: Root lane appears consistently in contract, canonical index, and operator profile.
Validator rejects positive authority at index 0.
items.requirement: Confirm index 0 is NULL_WELL and cannot carry positive authority.

items.evidence_target: Canonical index contains ALETHEOS_ROOT at index 1.
Operator profile records Q = M M^T and Thalean reference identity.
items.requirement: Confirm A, M, M^T, and Q operator discipline.

items.evidence_target: A ratification receipt names the chosen policy.
items.requirement: Decide whether current structural-key assignments are kept, changed, migrated, or discarded.

items.evidence_target: Schema and validator enforce no drift.
items.requirement: Confirm canonical index schema before public reliance.

items.evidence_target: scripts/validate_b32k_artifacts.py passes and contains these checks.
items.requirement: Confirm validator blocks duplicate lane/index, illegal index 0, and mismatched bindings.

items.evidence_target: Contract draft reviewed and status updated.
items.requirement: Confirm contract language for scaffold, binding, sovereign authority, subscriber reliance, and no-legal-advice boundary.
Confirm no commercial or sovereign reliance before ratification.
Create a ratification receipt only after all required checks pass.
Tag the ratified release after ratification receipt is committed.

keeper: Ratification is the moment the address becomes promise.
role: Checklist for moving Aletheos binding profile from pre-ratification to ratified.
title: Aletheos Ratification Checklist
